title: Midland Avenue Paving Project — $620K Budget Overrun, TIP Funds Unavailable
summary: City Engineer Mary Robinson presents items 11-13 for the Midland Avenue paving project (Ostrander Ave to West Seneca Turnpike). Bids came in $620K over budget due to a one-year delay from NYS DOT staff shortages and additional curbing. Local funds cover the shortfall, bringing total to $5.286M. Funding remains 71% federal, 13% Marchiselli, 16% local. Low bidder is Nardozi. Completion expected this year.
